entry.title: 3 luxury activities in 🇨🇭: 1. Paragliding in Zermatt (better book an early flight for better views). I flew with the only female pilot from @Fly Zermatt Paragliding and it was the best decision! 2. Golden Pass Express, do not pay for the first class, as
